title: JDTLS Initialization Options
description: Schema for Eclipse JDT Language Server initialization options. Auto-generated from Preferences.java at https://github.com/eclipse-jdtls/eclipse.jdt.ls/blob/main/org.eclipse.jdt.ls.core/src/org/eclipse/jdt/ls/core/internal/preferences/Preferences.java

bundles.description: A list of Java LS extension bundles (paths to JARs).

workspaceFolders.description: A list of workspace folders (as URIs).

associations.description: Files associations to languages Map of glob patterns (e.g. '*.xyz') to language ids.

enabled.description: Preference key to enable/disable the 'auto build'.

actions.description: Preference key for list of cleanups to run on save

actionsOnSave.description: Deprecated. List of cleanup action IDs to run on save. Use 'java.cleanup.actions' instead.

avoidVolatileChanges.description: Avoid reordering members that would cause volatile changes when sorting members.

codeGeneration.description: Code generation settings (hashCode/equals, toString, comments, etc.).

addFinalForNewDeclaration.description: A named preference that defines that fields created via code generation should be declared final

generateComments.description: A named preference that defines whether to generate method comments when generating the methods.

useInstanceof.description: A named preference that defines whether to use 'instanceof' to compare types when generating the hashCode and equals methods.

useJava7Objects.description: A named preference that defines whether to use Objects.hash and Objects.equals methods when generating the hashCode and equals methods.

insertionLocation.description: A named preference that defines the location to insert the code generated by source actions.

codeStyle.description: The code style to use when generating toString() methods. Values: STRING_CONCATENATION, STRING_BUILDER, STRING_BUILDER_CHAINED, STRING_FORMAT.

limitElements.description: Limit the number of elements included in generated toString() output. 0 means no limit.

listArrayContents.description: Whether to list array contents in generated toString() methods.

skipNullValues.description: Whether to skip null values in generated toString() methods.

template.description: The preferences for generating toString method.

useBlocks.description: A named preference that defines whether to use blocks in 'if' statements when generating the methods.

mode.description: Mode for annotation-based null analysis. 'disabled' turns it off, 'interactive' prompts when annotations are detected, 'automatic' enables it whenever null annotations are found on the classpath.

nonnull.description: Fully qualified names of @NonNull annotation types to use for null analysis.

nonnullbydefault.description: Fully qualified names of @NonNullByDefault annotation types to use for null analysis.

nullable.description: Fully qualified names of @Nullable annotation types to use for null analysis.

completion.description: Code completion settings (favorites, import order, postfix, chain, etc.).

enabled.description: Preference key to enable/disable chain completion.

collapseCompletionItems.description: Whether to collapse overloaded completion items into a single entry.

enabled.description: Preference key to enable/disable the 'completion'.

favoriteStaticMembers.description:
A named preference that holds the favorite static members.

Value is of type String: list of favorites.

filteredTypes.description: Types to filter (hide) from completion results. Supports wildcard patterns (e.g. 'com.sun.*').

guessMethodArguments.description:
A named preference that controls if method arguments are guessed when a method is selected from as list of code assist proposal.

Value is of type Boolean.

importOrder.description:
A named preference that holds a list of package names. The list specifies the import order used by the "Organize Imports" operation.

Value is of type String: list of package names

lazyResolveTextEdit.description: Lazy resolve text edit settings for completion.

enabled.description: Preference key to specify whether text edit of completion item can be lazily resolved.

matchCase.description: Preference key to specify whether to match case when completion.

maxResults.description: Preference key for maximum number of completion results to be returned. Defaults to 50.

overwrite.description:
A named preference that controls if the Java code assist only inserts completions. When set to true, code completion overwrites the current text. When set to false, code is simply added instead.

Value is of type Boolean.

enabled.description: Preference key to enable/disable postfix completion.

configuration.description: Project configuration settings (runtimes, build configuration, Maven).

defaultMojoExecutionAction.description: Default action for Maven mojo executions that are not covered by lifecycle mappings. Values: ignore, execute, warn, error.

globalSettings.description: Preference key for Maven global settings.xml location.

lifecycleMappings.description: Preference key for Maven lifecycle mappings xml location.

notCoveredPluginExecutionSeverity.description: Severity of the problem marker for Maven plugin executions not covered by lifecycle mappings.

userSettings.description: Preference key for Maven user settings.xml location.

default.description: Whether this is the default runtime.

updateBuildConfiguration.description: Preference key for project build/configuration update settings.

preferred.description: Preference key for the id(s) of the preferred content provider(s).

filter.description: Glob patterns to filter diagnostics from specific files or paths.

downloadSources.description: Preference key to enable/disable downloading source artifacts for Eclipse projects.

edit.description: Editor behavior settings (smart semicolon, buffer validation, etc.).

enabled.description: Preference key used to controls the "smart semicolon" detection

validateAllOpenBuffersOnChanges.description: Whether to re-validate all open Java files when any file is changed, or only the changed file.

enabled.description: Preference key to enable/disable executeCommand.
Preference key to enable/disable the 'foldingRange'.

format.description: Code formatter settings (enable/disable, profile, on-type, comments, etc.).

enabled.description: Preference key used to include the comments during the formatting.
Preference key to enable/disable formatter.
Preference key to enable/disable formatter on-type.

url.description: Specifies the file path or url to the formatter xml url.

home.description: Specifies the folder path to the JDK .

enabled.description: Preference key to enable/disable Javadoc on hover.

implementationCodeLens.description: Preference key to set implementation code lenses.

exclusions.description: Preference key to exclude directories when importing projects.

enabled.description: Preference key to enable/disable Gradle Annotation Processing.

arguments.description: Preference key for arguments to pass to Gradle

enabled.description: Preference key to enable/disable gradle importer.

home.description: Preference key for the JVM used to run the Gradle daemon..

jvmArguments.description: Preference key for JVM arguments to pass to Gradle

enabled.description: Preference key to enable/disable gradle offline mode.

version.description: Preference key for gradle version to use when the gradle wrapper is not used.

enabled.description: Preference key to enable/disable gradle wrapper.

disableTestClasspathFlag.description: Preference key to enable/disable maven test classpath flag.

enabled.description: Preference key to enable/disable maven importer.
Preference key to enable/disable maven offline mode.

checksums.description:
A named preference that holds the allowed gradle wrapper sha256 checksums.

Value is of type String: list of checksums.

inlayHints.description: Inlay hints settings (parameter names, variable types, etc.).

enabled.description: Enable/disable formatting for inlay hint parameters.
Preference key for the inlay hints parameters mode

exclusions.description: Preference key for the inlay hints exclusion list

suppressWhenSameNameNumbered.description: Suppress parameter name inlay hints when the argument is a variable with the same name as the parameter, possibly followed by a number.

parameterTypes.description: Parameter type inlay hints settings (e.g. lambda parameters).

enabled.description: Enable/disable inlay hints for parameter types in lambda expressions.

variableTypes.description: Variable type inlay hints settings (e.g. var declarations).

enabled.description: Enable/disable inlay hints for variable types (e.g. 'var' declarations).

ls.description: JDT Language Server settings (protobuf, Android, AspectJ, Kotlin, Groovy, javac).

enabled.description: Enable/disable Android project support in the language server.
Enable/disable AspectJ (.aj) support in the language server.
Enable/disable Groovy support in the language server.
Enable/disable using javac (OpenJDK compiler) instead of ECJ (Eclipse Compiler for Java) as the compilation backend.
Enable/disable Kotlin support in the language server.
Enable/disable Protocol Buffers (protobuf) support in the language server.

downloadSources.description: Preference key to enable/disable downloading Maven source artifacts.

updateSnapshots.description: Preference key to force update of Snapshots/Releases.

maxConcurrentBuilds.description: Preference key to set max concurrent build count.

memberSortOrder.description:
A named preference that defines how member elements are ordered by code actions.

Value is of type String: A comma separated list of the following entries. Each entry must be in the list, no duplication. List order defines the sort order.

  • T: Types
  • C: Constructors
  • I: Initializers
  • M: Methods
  • F: Fields
  • SI: Static Initializers
  • SM: Static Methods
  • SF: Static Fields

project.description: Project settings (encoding, output path, source paths, referenced libraries, resource filters).

outputPath.description: Preference key to specify the output path of the invisible project

referencedLibraries.description: Preference key to specify the local libraries referenced by invisible project

oneOf.description: Shortcut: an array of include patterns.

sources.description: Map of library path to source path.

resourceFilters.description: Specifies filter applied on projects to exclude some file system objects while populating the resources tree.

sourcePaths.description: Preference key to specify the source paths of the invisible project

showAt.description: Preference key for Show quickfixes at the problem or line level.

replace.description: Whether extracting an interface should replace all occurrences of the class with the new interface where possible.

includeAccessors.description: Preference key used to include getter, setter and builder/constructor when finding references.

includeDecompiledSources.description: Preference key used to include the decompiled sources when finding references.

enabled.description: Preference key to enable/disable reference code lenses.
Preference key to enable/disable rename.

cleanup.description: Enable/disable running cleanup actions on save.

organizeImports.description: Preference key to enable/disable organize imports on save

scope.description:
Preference key to set the scope value to use when searching java code. Allowed value are
  • main - Scope for main code
  • all - Scope for both test and main code
Any other unknown value will be treated as all.

enabled.description: Preference key to enable/disable the selection range.

url.description: Specifies the file path or url to the Java setting.

enabled.description: Preference key to enable/disable API descriptions in signature help.
Preference key to enable/disable signature help.

starThreshold.description:
A named preference that specifies the number of imports added before a star-import declaration is used.

Value is of type Integer: positive value specifying the number of non star-import is used

staticStarThreshold.description:
A named preference that specifies the number of static imports added before a star-import declaration is used.

Value is of type Integer: positive value specifying the number of non star-import is used

symbols.description: Symbol settings (include source method declarations, generated code).

includeGeneratedCode.description: Include generated code (e.g. Lombok getters, setters, constructors) in document symbols.

includeSourceMethodDeclarations.description: Include method declarations from source files in symbol search.

enabled.description: Enable/disable sending telemetry data to the language server.

fileHeader.description: Specifies the file header snippets for new Java file.

typeComment.description: Specifies the type comment snippets for new Java type.

updateImportsOnPaste.description: Settings for organizing imports on paste.

enabled.description: Preference key to enable/disable organize imports on paste

severity.description: Severity of the message when the classpath is incomplete for a Java file.

downloadSources.description: Whether to download Gradle dependency sources.
